ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "item_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content of the item (e.g., Low Fat, Regular) */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., Dairy, Soft Drinks, Meat) */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the item */,
  "item_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the item */,
  "item_stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "item_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "item_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the item's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_city" TEXT /* City where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_state" TEXT /* State where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_country" TEXT /* Country where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the outlet */,
  "outlet_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* Email address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet (e.g., Medium, High) */,
  "outlet_location_type" TEXT /* Location type of the outlet (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 3) */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of outlet (e.g., Supermarket Type1, Supermarket Type2) */,
  "outlet_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the outlet */,
  "outlet_opening_date" TEXT /* Opening date of the outlet */,
  "outlet_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the outlet's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the item is being sold */,
  "item_outlet_sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the item at the outlet */,
  "years_established" INTEGER /* Number of years the outlet has been established */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_time" TEXT /* Time of the sale */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "sale_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the sale */,
  "sale_total" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the sale */,
  "sale_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the sale's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "customer_state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "customer_country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "customer_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "customer_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the customer's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "employee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "employee_address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "employee_city" TEXT /* City where the employee is located */,
  "employee_state" TEXT /* State where the employee is located */,
  "employee_country" TEXT /* Country where the employee is located */,
  "employee_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the employee */,
  "employee_position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "employee_hire_date" TEXT /* Hire date of the employee */,
  "employee_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the employee's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)
